            "hello": {
              "doc": "Say hello.",
              "request": [
                {
                  "name": "greeting",
                  "type": "Greeting"
                }
              ],
              "response": "Greeting",
              "errors": [

            }

            {
              "type": "string",
              "name": "Field"
            }
          ]

        public void Request(global::Avro.Specific.ICallbackRequestor requestor, string messageName, object[] args, object callback)
        {
            switch (messageName)
            {
                case "hello":
                    requestor.Request<global::SchemaNamespace.Greeting>(messageName, args, callback);
                    break;
                default:
                    throw new global::Avro.AvroRuntimeException($"Unknown message: {messageName}");
